data.title: New Black Mirror Episode Appears to Skewer Pump.fun
data.description:
The first episode of the latest Black Mirror episode appears to be parodying the Pumpm. fun live-streaming debacle.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/new-black-mirror-episode-appears-to-skewer-pump-fun

data.title: Ethereum Has a Bullish Case Despite Rising Levels of Bearishness, Says Crypto Analytics Platform Santiment
data.description:
The crypto analytics platform Santiment says there may be a bull case for Ethereum (ETH) in 2025, even as it continues to display rising levels of bearishness.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/11/ethereum-has-a-bullish-case-despite-rising-levels-of-bearishness-says-crypto-analytics-platform-santiment/

data.title: Crypto Biz: Ripple’s ‘defining moment,’ Binance’s ongoing purge
data.description:
Ripple made headlines this week when it became the first crypto-native company to acquire a multi-asset prime broker, potentially setting the stage for wider adoption of its XRP Ledger technology.  The acquisition of Hidden Road didn’t come cheap, either, as Ripple doled out $1. 25 billion for the brokerage. It was a price Ripple CEO Brad Garlinhouse was happy to pay as the company set its sights on global expansion
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-biz-ripple-defining-moment-binance-s-ongoing-purge?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Jack Dorsey’s Block Settles With New York Regulator for $40,000,000 Over Alleged Cash App Crypto Compliance Issues
data.description:
The digital payments company co-founded by Jack Dorsey has settled with the New York state financial regulator amid alleged compliance issues with its Bank Secrecy Act/Anti-Money Laundering (BSA/AML) program.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/11/jack-dorseys-block-settles-with-new-york-regulator-for-40000000-over-alleged-cash-app-crypto-compliance-issues/

data.title: Chronicle tapped as oracle provider for winners of the $1 billion SparkDAO Tokenization Grand Prix
data.description:
Winners include BlackRock’s BUIDL fund, Superstate’s USTB fund and Centrifuge’s JTRSY, which uses Janus Henderson as a sub-advisor.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350614/chronicle-tapped-as-oracle-provider-for-winners-of-the-1-billion-sparkdao-tokenization-grand-prix?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: US Fed 'absolutely' ready to step in if liquidity dries up — Voting member
data.description:
The US Federal Reserve is prepared to use its vast arsenal of monetary policy tools to prevent financial and economic conditions from deteriorating rapidly but will do so only if liquidity dries up or markets become disorderly, a top central banker said. In an interview with the Financial Times, Boston Fed President Susan Collins said the central bank “would absolutely be prepared” to backstop markets if needed. Overall, however, the Fed is “not seeing liquidity concerns,” said Collins
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-liquidity-federal-reserve-absolutely-ready-backstop-markets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump Memecoin Facing $320M Unlock as Token Hits New Lows
data.description:
As TRUMP continues to sink in the months post-launch, insiders are about to get their first big unlock of 40 million tokens.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/trump-memecoin-facing-320m-unlock-as-token-hits-new-lows

data.title: Shibarium Devs Get Direct Line to Core Team via New Channel
data.description:
Shibarium devs now have a dedicated pipeline for technical support, as the core team launches a specialized Telegram channel providing direct access for real-time assistance. This crucial new hub is live, aiming to slash technical roadblocks and accelerate dApp creation by offering Shibarium devs a direct line to the engineering team. Direct Support Channel Launched for Shibarium Devs This latest initiative focuses squarely on improving the experience for Shibarium devs. The creation of the dedicated Telegram group was announced by “John Doe,” identified as a pseudonymous Shibarium engineering manager
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/04/11/shibarium-devs-get-direct-line-to-core-team-via-new-channel/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=shibarium-devs-get-direct-line-to-core-team-via-new-channel

data.title: Japan’s FSA proposes two-category classification for digital assets in new crypto regulation framework
data.description:
Japan plans to classify crypto assets into two categories: Type 1, which includes utility tokens, and Type 2, which includes Ethereum and Bitcoin.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-proposes-classification-for-cryptos/

data.title: This year's top ETF strategy? Shorting Ether — Bloomberg Intelligence
data.description:
Betting against Ether has been the best performing exchange traded fund (ETF) strategy so far in 2025, according to Bloomberg analyst Eric Balchunas. Two ETFs designed to take two-times leveraged short positions in Ether claimed (ETH) first and second place in a Bloomberg Intelligence ranking of the year’s top-performing funds, Balchunas said in a post on the X platform.   In the year-to-date, ProShares UltraShort Ether ETF (ETHD) and T Rex 2X Inverse Ether Daily Target ETF (ETQ) are up approximately 247% and 219%, respectively, Bloomberg Intelligence data showed.  The implications for Ether are “brutal,” Balchunas said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/this-year-s-top-etf-strategy-shorting-ether-bloomberg-intelligence?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
